<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en-GB">


<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>Draft&Lens — Editorial Analysis</title>

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>


*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }


:root {

--paper: #f5f1e8;

--cream: #ede8d8;

--warm-mid: #ddd8c8;

--rule: #b8b0a0;

--rule-l: #d8d2c4;

--ink: #1a1710;

--ink-mid: #3a3628;

--ink-soft: #5a5448;

--ink-faint: #8a8478;

--amber: #a86c10;

--amber-d: #7a4e08;

--amber-l: #c88c30;

--red: #8b2020;

--green: #2a5030;

--blue: #1a3a5c;

--tension: #b03010;

--pace: #1a6030;

--emotion: #2a4880;

--black-band: #14120e;

--nav-h: 52px;

--sidebar-w: 200px;


/* ── Upload screen surfaces ─────── */

--surface-input: #1a1814;

--surface-deep: #0f0e0b;

--border-dark: #2e2a22;

--border-deeper: #2a2820;


/* ── Semantic states ────────────── */

--error: #c05050;

--success: #6a9a72;


/* ── Light text on dark ─────────── */

--paper-dark: #c8c0a8;


/* ── Form label amber ───────────── */

--label-amber: #A96C10;

}


html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }


body {

background: var(--paper);

font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;

color: var(--ink);

min-height: 100vh;

font-size: 15px;

}


/* ─── NAV ─────────────────────────────── */

nav {

position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;

height: var(--nav-h);

display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;

padding: 0 2.5rem;

background: var(--black-band);

border-bottom: 2px solid var(--amber);

}

.nav-logo {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .95rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--paper); font-weight: 500;

}

.nav-logo span { color: var(--amber-l); }

.nav-meta {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .62rem; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #5a5448; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem;

}


/* ─── LAYOUT ──────────────────────────── */

.layout {

display: flex;

padding-top: var(--nav-h);

min-height: 100vh;

background: var(--paper);

}


/* ─── RIGHT SIDEBAR NAV ───────────────── */

.sidebar {

position: fixed;

top: var(--nav-h);

right: 0;

width: var(--sidebar-w);

height: calc(100vh - var(--nav-h));

overflow-y: auto;

background: var(--cream);

border-left: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

padding: 1.5rem 0;

z-index: 50;

}

.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 3px; }

.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--rule); }

.sidebar-title {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .52rem; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--ink-faint); padding: 0 1.25rem .75rem;

border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l); margin-bottom: .5rem;

}

.sidebar-link {

display: block; padding: .4rem 1.25rem;

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .6rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--ink-faint); text-decoration: none;

border-left: 2px solid transparent;

transition: all .15s; line-height: 1.4;

}

.sidebar-link:hover { color: var(--ink-mid); border-left-color: var(--rule); }

.sidebar-link.active { color: var(--amber-d); border-left-color: var(--amber); background: rgba(168,108,16,.06); }

.sidebar-group {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .02em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--ink-soft); padding: .9rem 1.25rem .3rem;

}


/* ─── MAIN CONTENT ────────────────────── */

.main {

flex: 1;

margin-right: var(--sidebar-w);

max-width: calc(100% - var(--sidebar-w));

background: var(--paper);

min-height: 100vh;

}


.page-wrap {

max-width: 860px;

margin: 0 auto;

padding: 0 3rem 8rem;

}


/* ─── TITLE BLOCK ─────────────────────── */

.title-block {

padding: 3.5rem 0 0;

display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 200px;

gap: 3rem; padding-bottom: 2.5rem;

border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);

}

.title-kicker {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898; margin-bottom: 1rem;

display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .75rem;

}

.title-kicker::before { content: ''; width: 24px; height: 1px; background: var(--amber); }

.story-title {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);

font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.05;

letter-spacing: -.02em; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: .6rem;

word-break: break-word;

}

.story-byline {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: .95rem; font-style: italic;

color: var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.5;

}

.title-summary-text {

font-size: .88rem; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--ink-soft);

max-width: 500px; border-left: 2px solid var(--rule); padding-left: 1rem;

}

.stat-block {

border: 1px solid var(--rule-l); padding: 1rem; background: var(--cream);

}

.stat-block-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898; margin-bottom: .6rem;

}

.stat-item {

display: flex; justify-content: space-between;

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .06em;

padding: .3rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

color: var(--ink-soft);

}

.stat-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

.stat-item strong { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 500; }


/* ─── VERDICT ─────────────────────────── */

.verdict-row {

display: flex; align-items: stretch;

background: var(--black-band);

margin: 0 -3rem 0; /* full bleed */

}

.verdict-accent { width: 4px; background: var(--amber); flex-shrink: 0; }

.verdict-inner {

flex: 1; padding: 2rem 3rem;

display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3rem;

}

.verdict-ruling {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.7rem; font-weight: 700;

color: var(--amber-l); white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1;

}

.verdict-sep { width: 1px; background: #3a3628; align-self: stretch; flex-shrink: 0; }

.verdict-detail {

font-size: .88rem; line-height: 1.75;

color: #b8b0a0; font-style: italic; max-width: 500px;

}


/* ─── DASHBOARD HEADER ────────────────── */

.dashboard-header {

padding: 2.5rem 0 1rem;

border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);

margin-bottom: 2rem;

}

.dashboard-header-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); margin-bottom: .4rem;

}

.dashboard-header-title {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700;

color: var(--ink); letter-spacing: -.01em;

}


/* ─── DATA SECTION ────────────────────── */

.data-section {

display: grid; grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr;

gap: 3rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem;

padding-bottom: 2.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

}

.data-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); margin-bottom: 1.25rem;

padding-bottom: .5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);

}

.bar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: .85rem 2rem; }

.bar-label-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: .3rem; }

.bar-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898;

}

.bar-score {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: .9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink);

}

.bar-track { height: 2px; background: var(--rule-l); }

.bar-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--amber); }


/* ─── ARC SECTION ─────────────────────── */

.arc-section {

margin-bottom: 2.5rem; padding-bottom: 2.5rem;

border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

}

.arc-header {

display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;

margin-bottom: 1rem;

}

.arc-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d);

}

.arc-legend {

display: flex; gap: 1.5rem;

}

.arc-legend-item {

display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .45rem;

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898; cursor: pointer; transition: colour .15s;

user-select: none;

}

.arc-legend-item:hover { color: var(--ink); }

.arc-legend-item.muted { opacity: .4; }

.arc-legend-dot { width: 12px; height: 2px; border-radius: 1px; }

.arc-wrap {

background: var(--cream); border: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

position: relative; overflow: visible;

}

.arc-note {

margin-top: .75rem;

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .08em;

color: #8a8070; font-style: italic;

}

/* Beat tooltip */

.arc-tooltip {

position: absolute;

background: var(--black-band); border-left: 2px solid var(--amber);

padding: .65rem .9rem; pointer-events: none; z-index: 20;

max-width: 220px; transform: translateX(-50%);

bottom: calc(100% + 10px); display: none;

}

.arc-tooltip.visible { display: block; }

.arc-tooltip-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898; margin-bottom: .25rem;

}

.arc-tooltip-note { font-size: .78rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #c8c0a8; font-style: italic; }


/* ─── ANALYSIS HEADER ─────────────────── */

.analysis-header {

padding: 2.5rem 0 1.5rem;

}

.analysis-header-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); margin-bottom: .4rem;

}

.analysis-header-title {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); letter-spacing: -.01em;

}


/* ─── COLLAPSIBLE SECTIONS ────────────── */

.section-wrap {

border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

}

.section-wrap.tinted { background: var(--cream); margin: 0 -3rem; padding: 0 3rem; }


.section-toggle {

width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;

padding: 1.25rem 0;

background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-align: left;

}

.section-toggle-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; }

.section-num-badge {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink-soft);

line-height: 1; width: 2.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; text-align: left;

}

.section-name {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898;

}

.section-chevron {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .7rem; color: var(--rule); transition: transform .2s;

flex-shrink: 0;

}

.section-wrap.open .section-chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }


.section-body {

display: none; padding-bottom: 1.75rem;

}

.section-wrap.open .section-body { display: block; }


.section-body p {

font-size: .92rem; line-height: 1.88; color: var(--ink-mid);

margin-bottom: .85rem; max-width: 660px;

}

.section-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

.section-body strong { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 500; }

.section-body em { color: var(--ink-soft); }

.section-quote {

margin: 1rem 0;

padding: .85rem 1.1rem;

background: var(--warm-mid);

border-left: 2px solid var(--amber);

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .78rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--ink-soft);

max-width: 600px;

}


/* ─── THREE THINGS ────────────────────── */

.three-band {

background: var(--black-band);

margin: 2.5rem -3rem;

padding: 2.5rem 3rem;

}

.three-band-title {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700;

color: var(--paper); margin-bottom: .35rem;

}

.three-band-sub {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .6rem; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-l); margin-bottom: 1.75rem;

padding-bottom: .75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2820;

}

.three-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; }

.thing-n {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 2.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #5a5650; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: .5rem;

}

.thing-tag {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .16em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #c8b898; margin-bottom: .6rem;

}

.thing-text { font-size: .88rem; line-height: 1.75; color: #c0b8a8; }


/* ─── DOWNLOAD ────────────────────────── */

.download-row {

display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: .75rem;

padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l); margin-bottom: 2.5rem;

}

.dl-btn {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .62rem; letter-spacing: .16em; text-transform: uppercase;

padding: .55rem 1.1rem; background: transparent;

border: 1px solid var(--rule); color: var(--ink-soft);

cursor: pointer; transition: all .15s;

}

.dl-btn:hover { border-color: var(--amber-d); color: var(--amber-d); }

.dl-btn.primary { background: var(--black-band); color: var(--paper); border-color: var(--black-band); }

.dl-btn.primary:hover { background: var(--ink); }


/* ─── LENS SECTION ────────────────────── */

.lens-section-header {

padding: 2rem 0 1.5rem;

border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);

margin-bottom: 1.75rem;

}

.lens-section-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); margin-bottom: .4rem;

}

.lens-section-title {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); letter-spacing: -.01em;

}


.lens-group-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); margin: 1.5rem 0 .75rem;

padding-bottom: .4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

}

.lens-strip {

display: grid;

grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));

gap: .4rem;

margin-bottom: .5rem;

}

.lens-pill {

display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem;

padding: .35rem .5rem;

border: 1px solid var(--rule-l); background: var(--cream);

cursor: pointer; transition: all .15s;

width: 100%;

}

.lens-pill:hover { border-color: var(--amber); background: var(--paper); }

.lens-pill.active { border-color: var(--amber-d); background: var(--black-band); }

.lens-thumb-wrap {

width: 38px; height: 38px; flex-shrink: 0;

overflow: hidden; background: var(--ink-mid);

display: flex; align-items: flex-start;

}

.lens-thumb {

width: 38px; min-height: 38px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;

filter: grayscale(100%) contrast(1.1);

display: block;

}

.lens-pill.active .lens-thumb { filter: grayscale(30%) contrast(1.05) sepia(15%); }

.lens-pill-info { overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; flex: 1; }

.lens-pill-name {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .62rem; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); line-height: 1.2; display: block;

white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

}

.lens-pill.active .lens-pill-name { color: var(--amber-l); }

.lens-pill-works {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .62rem; color: #8a8070; display: block;

line-height: 1.3; margin-top: .1rem;

white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden;

text-overflow: ellipsis; max-width: 120px;

}


/* ─── LENS PANEL ──────────────────────── */

.lens-panel {

background: var(--cream); border: 1px solid var(--rule);

overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 2.5rem;

}

.lens-panel-header {

display: flex; align-items: flex-start;

background: var(--paper);

min-height: 0;

}

.lens-panel-photo-LEGACY {

width: 90px; height: 90px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;

filter: grayscale(100%) contrast(1.1);

flex-shrink: 0; display: block;

background: var(--ink-mid);

}

.lens-panel-info {

flex: 1; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;

display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;

border-left: 1px solid var(--rule-l);

}

.lens-panel-name {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: .25rem;

}

.lens-panel-descriptor {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c8b898;

}

.lens-panel-body {

padding: 1.25rem 1.75rem;

font-size: .88rem; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--ink-mid); max-width: 680px;

}

.lens-panel-body p { margin-bottom: .85rem; }

.lens-panel-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

.lens-panel-body strong { color: var(--ink); }


/* ─── STUDIO MATCHING ─────────────────── */

.studio-section {

background: var(--black-band);

margin: 0 -3rem;

padding: 3rem 3rem 2.5rem;

}

.studio-section-label {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: var(--amber-d); margin-bottom: .4rem;

}

.studio-section-title {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--paper);

margin-bottom: .5rem; letter-spacing: -.01em;

}

.studio-section-note {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .6rem; letter-spacing: .1em;

color: #8a8478; margin-bottom: 2rem; font-style: italic;

}

.studio-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.25rem; }

.studio-card {

background: #1c1a16; border: 1px solid #2e2c28;

padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;

}

.studio-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: .6rem; }

.studio-name {

font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;

font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--paper);

}

.studio-match {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .6rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase;

padding: .2rem .5rem; background: rgba(200,140,48,.15);

color: var(--amber-l); border: 1px solid rgba(200,140,48,.3);

white-space: nowrap;

}

.studio-type {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;

color: #a09080; margin-bottom: .6rem;

}

.studio-rationale { font-size: .82rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #b0a898; }

.studio-contact {

margin-top: .75rem; padding-top: .75rem;

border-top: 1px solid #2e2c28;

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .58rem; letter-spacing: .08em; color: #9a9080;

}

.studio-contact a { color: var(--amber-l); text-decoration: none; }

.studio-contact a:hover { color: #f0c060; }

.studio-disclaimer {

margin-top: 1.5rem; padding-top: 1.25rem;

border-top: 1px solid #2e2c28;

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .55rem; letter-spacing: .08em; color: #7a7468; font-style: italic;

line-height: 1.6;

}


/* ─── TEXTAREA PLACEHOLDER ──────────── */

#scriptInput::placeholder{color:#ffffff;opacity:1;font-style:italic}


/* ─── THINKING INDICATOR ────────────── */

.think-frame {

width: 10px; height: 16px;

background: var(--amber-d);

opacity: .25;

animation: thinkPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;

}


@keyframes thinkPulse {

0%, 100% { opacity: .45; transform: scaleY(1); }

50% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(1.4); }

}

.think-task {

font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;

font-size: .55rem; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;

padding: .2rem .55rem;

border: 1px solid #3a3628;

color: #5a5448;

transition: all .3s;

}

.think-task--active {

border-color: var(--amber-l);

color: var(--paper);

background: rgba(200,140,48,.18);

}

.think-task--done {

border-color: #2a4a30;

color: #4a7a55;

background: rgba(42,74,48,.15);

}

.think-task--done::after { content: ' ✓'; }


/* ─── CONVERSATION PANEL ──────────────────────────────── */

.conv-msg-writer { display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; }

.conv-msg-writer-bubble {

background:var(--ink-mid); border:1px solid var(--ink-soft);

padding:.85rem 1.2rem; max-width:68%;

font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.88rem;

line-height:1.7; color:var(--paper);

}

.conv-msg-editorial-bubble {

background:var(--cream); border:1px solid var(--rule-l);

border-left:3px solid var(--amber-d);

padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;

font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.88rem;

line-height:1.8; color:var(--ink);

}

.conv-msg-editorial-bubble p + p { margin-top:.75rem; }

.conv-msg-lens-bubble {

background:#18140f; border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);

border-left:3px solid var(--amber);

padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;

font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.88rem;

line-height:1.8; color:#f0ead8;

}

.conv-msg-lens-bubble p + p { margin-top:.75rem; }

.conv-illustration {

background:var(--black-band); border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);

border-left:3px solid var(--amber);

padding:.9rem 1.1rem; margin:.75rem 0;

}

.conv-illustration-label {

font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.5rem;

letter-spacing:.16em; text-transform:uppercase;

color:var(--amber-d); margin-bottom:.4rem;

}

.conv-illustration-text {

font-family:'Libre Baskerville',serif; font-size:.85rem;

font-style:italic; line-height:1.7; color:#c8b898;

}

.conv-target-btn {

font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.52rem;

letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase;

padding:.25rem .6rem; border:1px solid var(--rule);

color:var(--ink-soft); background:none; cursor:pointer;

}

.conv-target-btn.active {

border-color:var(--amber-d); color:var(--amber-l);

background:rgba(168,108,16,.08);

}

.conv-suggestion-pill {

font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.58rem;

letter-spacing:.06em; color:var(--amber-d);

border:1px solid var(--amber-d); padding:.35rem .75rem;

cursor:pointer; background:rgba(168,108,16,.04);

}

.conv-suggestion-pill:hover {

background:rgba(168,108,16,.12); color:var(--amber-l);

}

.revision-item {

display:flex; gap:1rem; align-items:flex-start;

padding:.9rem 1.1rem; background:var(--cream);

border:1px solid var(--rule-l); border-left:3px solid var(--rule);

}

.revision-item.doing { border-left-color:var(--amber); }

.revision-item.done { border-left-color:var(--teal); opacity:.7; }

.revision-item.done .rev-text { text-decoration:line-through; color:var(--ink-faint); }

.revision-num {

font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.58rem;

color:var(--ink-soft); min-width:1.5rem; flex-shrink:0; padding-top:.1rem;

}

.rev-text { font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.85rem; line-height:1.6; color:var(--ink); }

.rev-meta { display:flex; gap:1rem; margin-top:.3rem; align-items:center; }

.rev-source { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.48rem; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--amber-d); }

.rev-date { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.48rem; letter-spacing:.06em; color:var(--ink-faint); }

.rev-status { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:.48rem; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-left:auto; padding:.15rem .4rem; border:1px solid currentColor; cursor:pointer; }

.rev-status.todo { color:var(--rule); }

.rev-status.doing { color:var(--amber); }

.rev-status.done-s { color:var(--teal); }



.lens-photo-container {

width: 60px; height: 60px; flex-shrink: 0;

overflow: hidden; background: var(--ink-soft);

position: relative; align-self: center;

}

.lens-photo-container img {

position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;

width: 100%; height: 100%;

object-fit: cover; object-position: center 20%;

filter: grayscale(100%) contrast(1.1);

display: block;

}


.lens-panel-body img { display: none !important; }

</style>

<script>

function imgFallback(img) {

var name = (img.alt || '?').trim();

var parts = name.split(' ');

var initials = (parts.length >= 2 ? parts[0][0] + parts[parts.length-1][0] : name.slice(0,2)).toUpperCase();

var isPanel = img.classList.contains('lens-panel-photo');

var size = isPanel ? 60 : 34;

var fs = isPanel ? 22 : 11;

var svg = "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='" + size + "' height='" + size + "'>" +

"<rect width='" + size + "' height='" + size + "' fill='%231e1c18'/>" +

"<text x='" + (size/2) + "' y='" + (size/2 + fs*0.38) + "' text-anchor='middle' font-family='monospace' font-size='" + fs + "' fill='%238a8070'>" + initials + "</text>" +

"</svg>";

img.src = 'data:image/svg+xml,' + svg;

img.onerror = null;

}

</script>

</head>

<body>


<!-- API KEY MODAL -->

<div id="apiModal" style="position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(10,9,7,.92);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9999">

<div style="background:var(--black-band);border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);padding:2.5rem;max-width:460px;width:90%">

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--paper);margin-bottom:.5rem">DRAFT<span style="color:var(--amber-l)">&</span>LENS</div>

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--ink-faint);font-style:italic;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.5rem">Enter your Anthropic API key to begin. Stored in this browser session only — never sent anywhere except directly to Anthropic.<br><br>Get a key at <a href="https://console.anthropic.com" target="_blank" style="color:var(--amber-l)">console.anthropic.com</a> → API Keys → Create Key.</p>

<input type="password" id="apiKeyInput" placeholder="sk-ant-..." autocomplete="off"

onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')saveKey()"

style="width:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.85rem;padding:.75rem 1rem;background:var(--surface-deep);border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);color:var(--paper);outline:none;margin-bottom:.75rem;letter-spacing:.05em">

<div id="apiModalError" style="display:none;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--error);margin-bottom:.75rem;padding:.4rem .6rem;border:1px solid var(--error);background:rgba(139,32,32,.1)"></div>

<button onclick="saveKey()" style="width:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.85rem;background:var(--amber);color:var(--black-band);border:none;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500">Begin</button>

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-mid);text-align:center;margin-top:.75rem">Key stored in sessionStorage only</p>

</div>

</div>


<nav>

<span class="nav-logo">DRAFT<span>&</span>LENS</span>

<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem">

<div id="modeBar" style="display:flex;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);opacity:.35;pointer-events:none">

<button onclick="setAppMode('script')" id="modeScript" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .85rem;background:var(--amber);color:var(--black-band);border:none;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500">Film Script</button>

<button onclick="setAppMode('story')" id="modeStory" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .85rem;background:transparent;color:var(--rule);border:none;cursor:pointer">Story</button>

<button onclick="setAppMode('play')" id="modePlay" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .85rem;background:transparent;color:var(--rule);border:none;cursor:pointer">Stage Play</button>

</div>

<button onclick="showUploadScreen()" id="navUploadBtn" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .85rem;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);color:var(--ink-faint);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s" onmouseover="this.style.color='var(--amber-l)';this.style.borderColor='var(--amber-d)'" onmouseout="this.style.color='#8a8070';this.style.borderColor='#3a3628'">↑ Upload</button>

<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;border-left:1px solid var(--ink-mid);margin-left:.25rem">

<a href="#sec-about" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:document.getElementById('sec-about')?.offsetTop,behavior:'smooth'})" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .6rem;color:var(--ink-faint);text-decoration:none;border-right:1px solid var(--ink-mid)">About</a>

<a href="#sec-glossary" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:document.getElementById('sec-glossary')?.offsetTop,behavior:'smooth'})" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .6rem;color:var(--ink-faint);text-decoration:none;border-right:1px solid var(--ink-mid)">Glossary</a>

<a href="#sec-feedback" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:document.getElementById('sec-feedback')?.offsetTop,behavior:'smooth'})" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .6rem;color:var(--ink-faint);text-decoration:none;border-right:1px solid var(--ink-mid)">Feedback</a>

<a href="#sec-legal" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:document.getElementById('sec-legal')?.offsetTop,behavior:'smooth'})" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .6rem;color:var(--ink-faint);text-decoration:none;border-right:1px solid var(--ink-mid)">Legal</a>

</div>

<button onclick="showKeyModal()" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.3rem .65rem;background:none;border:1px solid var(--border-deeper);color:var(--ink-mid);cursor:pointer" title="Change API key">Key</button>

</div>

</nav>


<!-- UPLOAD SCREEN -->

<div id="uploadScreen" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;top:52px;z-index:80;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--black-band)">


<!-- Centred logo -->

<div style="text-align:center;padding:3.5rem 2rem 0">

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.35em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber-d);margin-bottom:.75rem">Draft&amp;Lens</div>

<div style="width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--amber-d);margin:0 auto"></div>

</div>


<!-- Hero statement — centred, full width -->

<div style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:3rem 2rem 0;text-align:center">


<h1 style="font-family:'Libre Baskerville',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--paper);letter-spacing:-.03em;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1.75rem">An editorial intelligence.<br><em style="font-weight:300;color:var(--amber);font-style:italic">Not a ghostwriter.</em></h1>


<p style="font-size:.92rem;color:var(--rule);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:2rem;max-width:580px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto">Draft&amp;Lens reads your script or story the way a master editor would. After your analysis completes, go deeper. Apply the editorial perspective of some of the most celebrated directors, writers, and screenwriters in the industry — each one a craft-accurate simulation of how that voice would read your work. Optional, and entirely on your terms.</p>


<!-- Pull quote -->

<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border-deeper);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-deeper);padding:1rem 2rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem">

<p style="font-family:'Libre Baskerville',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:var(--rule);line-height:1.6">"It's like having an editor and mentor working with you."</p>

</div>


<!-- Lens names -->

<div style="margin-bottom:1.5rem">

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--rule);margin-bottom:.5rem">Editorial Lenses</div>

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--ink-faint);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.6">After analysis, apply the perspective of any of these voices to your work — some of the most influential and celebrated practitioners in their fields.</p>

<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;justify-content:center;max-width:760px;margin:0 auto">

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Hemingway</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Carver</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Chekhov</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">O'Connor</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Nabokov</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Bukowski</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Spielberg</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Villeneuve</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Coppola</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Tarantino</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Welles</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Wilder</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Sorkin</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Pinter</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Goldman</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Wachowskis</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Ridley Scott</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Coen Brothers</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Jeunet</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Wenders</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Feige</span>

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--rule);padding:.22rem .65rem;border:1px solid var(--ink-mid);white-space:nowrap">Bruckheimer</span>

</div>

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--ink-faint);line-height:1.6;font-style:italic;margin-top:.85rem;max-width:640px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto">Editorial lenses are AI-generated analytical perspectives inspired by the documented craft principles of these figures. They are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or representative of these individuals.</p>

</div>


</div>


<!-- Divider -->

<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border-deeper);max-width:760px;margin:1rem auto 0"></div>


<!-- Upload form — centred, contained -->

<div style="max-width:560px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem 2rem 6rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.25rem">


<div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:.5rem">

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--label-amber);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.4rem">New analysis</div>

<div style="font-family:'Libre Baskerville',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--paper)">Upload your work</div>

</div>


<!-- Drop zone -->

<div id="dropZone" onclick="document.getElementById('fileUpload').click()"

ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--amber)';this.style.background='rgba(200,146,42,.06)'"

ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--amber-d)';this.style.background='#1a1814'"

ondrop="handleDrop(event)"

style="background:var(--surface-input);padding:1.75rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid var(--amber-d);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:140px">

<input type="file" id="fileUpload" accept=".pdf,.txt,.fountain,.fdx,.docx" style="display:none" onchange="handleFileInput(this)">

<div id="dropZoneContent">

<!-- Book icon -->

<svg width="22" height="18" viewBox="0 0 22 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="margin:0 auto .75rem;display:block;opacity:.7">

<path d="M11 2 L11 16 M2 1 L2 17 Q6.5 15.5 11 17 Q15.5 15.5 20 17 L20 1 Q15.5 2.5 11 1 Q6.5 2.5 2 1Z" stroke="#c8b898" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>

</svg>

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:#ffffff;margin-bottom:.75rem">Drop file or click to upload</p>

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink-faint)">.PDF · .TXT · .FOUNTAIN · .FDX · .DOCX</p>

</div>

</div>


<!-- Paste area -->

<textarea id="scriptInput" rows="8" oninput="if(this.value.trim().length>50){const b=document.getElementById('modeBar');if(b){b.style.opacity='1';b.style.pointerEvents='auto'}}"

placeholder="Or paste your script or story here…"

style="width:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.8;padding:1rem 1.25rem;background:var(--surface-input);border:1px solid var(--amber-d);color:var(--paper-dark);outline:none;resize:vertical;font-style:italic;border-radius:18px;--placeholder-color:#ffffff"></textarea>



<!-- Word count indicator -->

<div id="wordCountWrap" style="display:none">

<div style="height:2px;background:var(--border-deeper);border-radius:1px;margin-bottom:.4rem;overflow:hidden">

<div id="wordCountBar" style="height:100%;background:var(--amber-d);transition:width .3s,background .3s;width:0%"></div>

</div>

<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline">

<span id="wordCountNum" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--rule)"></span>

<span id="wordCountLimit" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink-faint)"></span>

</div>

<div id="wordCountUpgrade" style="display:none;margin-top:.4rem;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--amber-l);line-height:1.6"></div>

</div>


<!-- Genre -->

<div>

<label style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--label-amber);font-weight:500;display:block;margin-bottom:.4rem">Genre / form <span style="color:var(--ink-soft)">(optional)</span></label>

<select id="genreSelect" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:.5rem .85rem;background:var(--surface-input);border:1px solid var(--border-dark);color:var(--paper-dark);outline:none;width:100%;appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none"></select>

</div>


<!-- Intent -->

<div>

<label style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--label-amber);font-weight:500;display:block;margin-bottom:.4rem">What are you going for? <span style="color:var(--ink-soft)">(optional)</span></label>

<input type="text" id="intentInput" maxlength="200"

placeholder="e.g. 'Villeneuve-ish sci-fi. Third act feels broken.'"

style="width:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;font-style:italic;padding:.5rem .9rem;background:var(--surface-input);border:1px solid var(--border-dark);color:var(--paper-dark);outline:none">

</div>


<!-- Character bible -->

<div style="border:1px solid var(--border-dark);background:var(--black-band)">

<div style="padding:.75rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-dark);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">

<div>

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--label-amber);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.2rem">Character bible</div>

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--rule);font-style:italic">Built automatically from your submission.</div>

</div>

<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:1rem">

<input type="checkbox" id="bibleIgnore" style="width:13px;height:13px;accent-color:var(--amber-d)">

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--rule)">Skip</span>

</label>

</div>

<div style="padding:.75rem 1rem">

<label style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--label-amber);font-weight:500;display:block;margin-bottom:.4rem">Paste your own to use instead <span style="color:var(--ink-soft)">(optional)</span></label>

<textarea id="bibleInput" rows="4"

placeholder="Characters, traits, relationships, voice patterns, wants, history — anything the analysis should know."

style="width:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;line-height:1.7;padding:.5rem .85rem;background:var(--surface-deep);border:1px solid var(--border-deeper);color:var(--rule);outline:none;resize:vertical;font-style:italic"></textarea>

</div>

</div>


<div id="uploadError" style="display:none;padding:.55rem .9rem;background:rgba(139,32,32,.12);border:1px solid rgba(139,32,32,.4);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;color:var(--error)"></div>


<!-- Analyse button -->

<button id="analyseBtn" onclick="startAnalysis()" disabled

style="width:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.95rem;background:var(--border-dark);color:var(--ink-soft);border:none;cursor:not-allowed;font-weight:500;transition:all .15s;border-radius:18px">Analyse</button>


<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink-faint);text-align:center;font-style:italic">Analysis takes 30–60 seconds and streams as it arrives</p>


</div>

</div>


<div id="errorBar" style="display:none;padding:.6rem 2.5rem;background:rgba(139,32,32,.15);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(139,32,32,.4);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--error);position:fixed;top:52px;left:0;right:0;z-index:70"></div>


<!-- THINKING INDICATOR — fixed below nav, only visible during analysis -->

<div id="thinkingBar" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:52px;left:0;right:0;z-index:68;background:var(--black-band);border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber-d);padding:0 2.5rem;">

<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;height:44px;gap:2rem;max-width:1060px">

<div id="thinkingLabel" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--paper);flex-shrink:0">Reading your work</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:.75rem;align-items:center;flex:1">

<div id="taskAnalysis" class="think-task think-task--active">Analysis</div>

<div id="taskScores" class="think-task think-task--active">Dashboard</div>

<div id="taskStudios" class="think-task think-task--active">Market</div>

<div id="taskBible" class="think-task think-task--active">Bible</div>

</div>

<div id="thinkingElapsed" style="display:none">0s</div>

</div>

</div>


<div class="layout">


<!-- ─── RIGHT SIDEBAR ─────────────────── -->

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">

<div class="sidebar-title">Jump to</div>

<div class="sidebar-group">Overview</div>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-title">Title & Summary</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-verdict">Verdict</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-bible">Character bible</a>

<div class="sidebar-group">Dashboard</div>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-dashboard">Dimension Map</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-arc">Story Arc</a>

<div class="sidebar-group">Analysis</div>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-01">First Impression</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-02">Structure</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-03">Character</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-04">Dialogue</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-05">Theme</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-06">Visual Writing</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-07">Tone</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-08">Protagonist</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-09">Antagonist</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-10">Pace</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-11">Commercial</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-12">What's working</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-13">Character consistency</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-14">Genre alignment</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-action">Action plan</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-directives">What to fix next</a>

<div class="sidebar-group">Action</div>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-three">Three Things</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-lenses">Editorial Lenses</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-studios">Studio Match</a>

<div class="sidebar-group" style="margin-top:1.25rem">Reference</div>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-about">About</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-glossary">Glossary</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-feedback">Feedback</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-contact">Contact</a>

<a class="sidebar-link" href="#sec-legal">Disclaimer</a>

</aside>


<!-- ─── MAIN ──────────────────────────── -->

<main class="main">

<div class="page-wrap">


<!-- TITLE BLOCK -->

<div class="title-block" id="sec-title">

<div>

<div class="title-kicker" id="dynKicker">—</div>

<h1 class="story-title" id="dynTitle">—</h1>

<div class="story-byline" id="dynByline"></div>

<div class="title-summary-text" id="dynSummary"></div>

</div>

<div>

<div class="stat-block">

<div class="stat-block-label">Document</div>

<div class="stat-item"><span>Pages</span><strong id="dynPages">—</strong></div>

<div class="stat-item"><span>Words</span><strong id="dynWords">—</strong></div>

<div class="stat-item"><span>Genre</span><strong id="dynGenre">—</strong></div>

<div class="stat-item"><span>Mode</span><strong id="dynMode">—</strong></div>

</div>

</div>

</div>


<!-- VERDICT -->

<div class="verdict-row" id="sec-verdict">

<div class="verdict-accent" id="dynVerdictAccent"></div>

<div class="verdict-inner">

<div class="verdict-ruling" id="dynVerdictRuling" style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:1rem">Upload your work and press Analyse</div>

<div class="verdict-sep" id="dynVerdictSep" style="display:none"></div>

<div class="verdict-detail" id="dynVerdictDetail"></div>

<!-- Film strip animation — shown during analysis only -->

<div id="verdictAnimation" style="display:none;margin-left:auto;display:none;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;flex-shrink:0">

<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;align-items:center">

<div class="think-frame" style="animation-delay:0s"></div>

<div class="think-frame" style="animation-delay:.15s"></div>

<div class="think-frame" style="animation-delay:.3s"></div>

<div class="think-frame" style="animation-delay:.45s"></div>

<div class="think-frame" style="animation-delay:.6s"></div>

</div>

<div id="verdictElapsed" style="display:none">0s</div>

</div>

</div>

</div><!-- /verdict-row -->


<!-- CHARACTER BIBLE PANEL -->

<div id="sec-bible" style="display:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-l);margin-bottom:0">

<button onclick="toggleBiblePanel()" style="width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:1.1rem 0;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;text-align:left">

<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem">

<span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber-d)">Character bible</span>

<span id="bibleSourceLabel" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.52rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.2rem .5rem;background:rgba(168,108,16,.1);color:var(--amber-d);border:1px solid rgba(168,108,16,.2)">Auto-generated</span>

</span>

<span id="bibleChevron" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--rule)">▼</span>

</button>

<div id="bibleBody" style="display:none;padding-bottom:1.5rem">

<p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:1rem;font-style:italic">Built from the submitted text. Cross-referenced against the analysis for consistency.</p>

<div id="bibleContent" style="font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.85;color:var(--ink-mid);white-space:pre-wrap;max-width:660px"></div>

</div>

</div>


<!-- DASHBOARD — always visible, populated from submission -->

<div id="dashboardSection" style="display:none">

<div class="dashboard-header" id="sec-dashboard">

<div class="dashboard-header-label">Editorial Dashboard</div>

<div class="dashboard-header-title">Craft Balance</div>

</div>

<div class="data-section">

<div>

<div class="data-label">Relative Balance</div>

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.48rem;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--ink-faint);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:.5rem">Shape shows where craft is balanced or skewed</div>

<svg id="radarSvg" width="280" height="230" viewBox="-30 0 280 230">

<g fill="none" stroke="var(--rule)" stroke-width="1" opacity=".7">

<polygon points="110,18 187,63 187,153 110,198 33,153 33,63"/>

<polygon points="110,42 163,72 163,148 110,178 57,148 57,72"/>

<polygon points="110,66 139,81 139,139 110,154 81,139 81,81"/>

<line x1="110" y1="18" x2="110" y2="198"/>

<line x1="187" y1="63" x2="33" y2="153"/>

<line x1="187" y1="153" x2="33" y2="63"/>

</g>

<text x="110" y="10" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="8" fill="var(--ink-soft)" letter-spacing="1">STRUCTURE</text>

<text x="200" y="62" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="7.5" fill="var(--ink-soft)" letter-spacing="0.5">CHARACTER</text>

<text x="200" y="158" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="7.5" fill="var(--ink-soft)" letter-spacing="0.5">DIALOGUE</text>

<text x="110" y="213" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="8" fill="var(--ink-soft)" letter-spacing="1">TONE</text>

<text x="18" y="158" text-anchor="end" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="7.5" fill="var(--ink-soft)" letter-spacing="0.5">PACE</text>

<text x="18" y="62" text-anchor="end" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="7.5" fill="var(--ink-soft)" letter-spacing="0.5">THEME</text>

<polygon id="radarShape" points="110,108 110,108 110,108 110,108 110,108 110,108" fill="rgba(168,108,16,.15)" stroke="var(--amber)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

<circle cx="110" cy="108" r="2.5" fill="var(--amber)"/>

</svg>

</div>

<div>

<div class="data-label">Tradition Alignment</div>

<div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.48rem;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--ink-faint);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:.5rem">How well each element serves the identified tradition</div>

<div class="bar-grid" id="scoreBarGrid">

<!-- populated by JS -->

</div>

</div>

</div>

<!-- ARC -->

<div class="arc-section" id="sec-arc">

<div class="arc-header">

<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem">

<div class="arc-label">Story Arc · Interpreted</div>

<button onclick="toggleArcInfo()" title="Why is this interpreted?" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--rule-l);color:var(--rule);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;padding:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .15s" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='var(--amber)';this.style.color='var(--amber)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='var(--rule-l)';this.style.color='var(--rule)'">i</button>

</div>

<div class="arc-legend">

<div class="arc-legend-item" onclick="toggleLine(this,'tension')" data-line="tension"><div class="arc-legend-dot" style="background:var(--tension)"></div>Tension</div>

<div class="arc-legend-item" onclick="toggleLine(this,'pace')" data-line="pace"><div class="arc-legend-dot" style="background:var(--pace)"></div>Pace</div>

<div class="arc-legend-item" onclick="toggleLine(this,'emotion')" data-line="emotion"><div class="arc-legend-dot" style="background:var(--emotion)"></div>Emotion</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="arc-wrap" style="height:180px;position:relative">

<div class="arc-tooltip" id="arcTooltip"><div class="arc-tooltip-label" id="tooltipLabel"></div><div class="arc-tooltip-note" id="tooltipNote"></div></div>

<svg id="arcSvg" width="100%" height="180" viewBox="0 0 860 180" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="display:block">

<line x1="0" y1="45" x2="860" y2="45" stroke="var(--rule-l)" stroke-width=".8"/>

<line x1="0" y1="90" x2="860" y2="90" stroke="var(--rule-l)" stroke-width=".8"/>

<line x1="0" y1="135" x2="860" y2="135" stroke="var(--rule-l)" stroke-width=".8"/>

<line x1="258" y1="0" x2="258" y2="180" stroke="var(--rule)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/>

<line x1="602" y1="0" x2="602" y2="180" stroke="var(--rule)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/>

<text x="129" y="13" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="9" fill="var(--rule)" letter-spacing="2">ACT I</text>

<text x="430" y="13" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="9" fill="var(--rule)" letter-spacing="2">ACT II</text>

<text x="731" y="13" text-anchor="middle" font-family="IBM Plex Mono" font-size="9" fill="var(--rule)" letter-spacing="2">ACT III</text>

<polyline id="lineTension" points="0,90 860,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--tension)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

<polyline id="linePace" points="0,90 860,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--pace)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

<polyline id="lineEmotion" points="0,90 860,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--emotion)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

<g id="arcBeats"></g>

</svg>

</div>

<div class="arc-note" id="arcNote" style="display:none">Arc reflects page order. If your story is told non-chronologically — events presented out of sequence — this structural reading may not map to your intended narrative shape.</div>

</div>

</div>


<!-- ANALYSIS HEADER + LIVE SECTIONS -->

<div id="analysisHeader" style="display:none">

<div class="analysis-header">

<div class="analysis-header-label">Editorial Analysis</div>

<div class="analysis-header-title">Section by Section Breakdown</div>

</div>

</div>


<div id="reportContent" style="display:none"></div>


<!-- STATIC DEMO — hidden when real analysis runs -->

<div id="staticDemo">

<div class="analysis-header">

<div class="analysis-header-label">Editorial Analysis</div>

<div class="analysis-header-title">Section by Section Breakdown</div>

</div>


<!-- SECTIONS — first 5 open, rest closed -->


<div class="section-wrap open" id="sec-01">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-01')">

<span class="section-toggle-left">

<span class="section-num-badge">01</span>

<span class="section-name">First Impression</span>

</span>

<span class="section-chevron">▲</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>Page one commands the read. The image of the daughter pressing her palm against the frosted glass — her mother's outline on the other side — is an opening that earns its place. It establishes atmosphere, stakes, and the central relationship in a single visual. That is a screenwriter who knows the form.</p>

<p>The tonal promise set on page one — measured, quiet, visually precise — is largely kept. The question is whether it holds through the mid-section, or whether the script retreats to something safer when the silence becomes difficult to sustain.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap tinted open" id="sec-02">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-02')">

<span class="section-toggle-left">

<span class="section-num-badge">02</span>

<span class="section-name">Structure</span>

</span>

<span class="section-chevron">▲</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The three-act architecture is sound. Act One establishes world and wound with economy; the inciting incident at page 18 is correctly placed and correctly dramatised. The Act One break at page 28 is a genuine turn — a commitment to action that cannot be reversed.</p>

<p><strong>The problem is Act Two.</strong> Pages 45–72 are beautiful and static. Three scenes in succession — the market, the temple, the unanswered phone call — are doing the same emotional work. One contains the script's best dialogue. The other two are the same scene rewritten with different furniture.</p>

<div class="section-quote">"She sits. She waits. She does not speak." — this stage direction appears, in variant form, eleven times between pages 45 and 90. The protagonist is observing her own story.</div>

<p>The midpoint at page 54 is the script's strongest scene. The Act Two break needs more preparation: burning the letters is visually right but emotionally underprepared. One additional scene before it would change everything.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap open" id="sec-03">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-03')">

<span class="section-toggle-left">

<span class="section-num-badge">03</span>

<span class="section-name">Character</span>

</span>

<span class="section-chevron">▲</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The secondary characters are more alive than the protagonist. The grandmother's three scenes contain the script's most precise, inhabited writing. She arrives fully formed. The daughter — the protagonist — feels observed rather than inhabited.</p>

<p>The supporting cast each want something specific and that want pressures every scene they're in. This is correct. The antagonist — the father — is the script's most interesting structural problem: he is not present but is present in every scene. That is a strong choice. It is not yet fully exploited.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap tinted open" id="sec-04">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-04')">

<span class="section-toggle-left">

<span class="section-num-badge">04</span>

<span class="section-name">Dialogue</span>

</span>

<span class="section-chevron">▲</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>At its best, the dialogue in this script is doing what dialogue should: it says something other than what it means. The exchange on page 34 between the daughter and the grandmother about the garden is the script's finest scene — two people talking about plants and talking about everything else simultaneously.</p>

<p>The problem is consistency. When the script is uncertain, the characters explain. Page 67 has three consecutive lines in which a character tells another character how they are feeling. This is the most common failure mode in dramatic dialogue and the easiest to fix: cut the explanation, keep the action.</p>

<div class="section-quote">Each character has a distinct verbal register in the script's best scenes. In its weaker passages, they all sound like the same careful writer. The distinction collapses under pressure.</div>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap open" id="sec-05">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-05')">

<span class="section-toggle-left">

<span class="section-num-badge">05</span>

<span class="section-name">Theme</span>

</span>

<span class="section-chevron">▲</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The theme is clear and genuine: silence as inheritance. What a family refuses to say passes from generation to generation as surely as what it says. This is embodied in the visual structure of the script — the recurring image of water, of still surfaces and distorted reflections — and it is mostly dramatised rather than stated. Mostly.</p>

<p>Page 82 has a monologue in which the protagonist states the theme directly. It is the script's weakest scene. The audience has already understood what she is now explaining. Cut it entirely, or reduce it to its last two lines.</p>

</div>

</div>


<!-- Sections 6–12: closed by default -->

<div class="section-wrap tinted" id="sec-06">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-06')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">06</span><span class="section-name">Visual Writing</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The script is largely written for the screen, not transcribed onto it. The frosted glass opening, the photograph midpoint, the burning letters — all are cinematic rather than literary. The writer understands that the camera sees, not reads.</p>

<p>The weakness is in the action lines during Act Two. Under emotional pressure, the writing retreats to interiority: "She feels the weight of what she does not know." This is not a camera direction. It is a prose note. The equivalent visual action — something she does, something she picks up, something she looks at for too long — needs to replace it.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap" id="sec-07">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-07')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">07</span><span class="section-name">Tone</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The tonal contract is established on page one and largely honoured. This is a quiet, precise drama. It does not raise its voice. The restraint is a strength — it earns its emotional moments because it does not reach for them cheaply.</p>

<p>The one significant tonal break is the scene at the airport, page 78. It plays as a different film — faster, more explicit, more anxious. It may be a remnant of an earlier draft with different tonal ambitions. It currently reads as an intrusion.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap tinted" id="sec-08">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-08')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">08</span><span class="section-name">Protagonist</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p><strong>Want: to understand her mother's silence. Need: to forgive her own.</strong> The gap between these is correctly withheld from the protagonist until Act Three. The problem is agency — between pages 45 and 85, she makes no active choice. Things happen to her. She observes.</p>

<p>The fix is not to add plot. It is to find the scene — probably replacing the temple sequence — where she asks the question she has been afraid to ask, and receives an answer she did not want.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap" id="sec-09">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-09')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">09</span><span class="section-name">Antagonist</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The absent father is structurally compelling — a shadow antagonist who shapes every room he isn't in. The script understands this. What it hasn't yet done is give him sufficient interiority through the memories and documents that reference him. He is currently a wound without a person attached to it.</p>

<p>One scene — even a brief one, even in flashback — in which he is demonstrably right about something would transform the dynamic entirely. The best antagonists believe they are right. This one needs to believe it where we can see it.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap tinted" id="sec-10">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-10')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">10</span><span class="section-name">Pace</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>Act One paces well — the world is established with economy and the inciting incident lands at the right moment. Act Three has genuine momentum. The problem, as the arc visualisation shows, is Act Two's extended plateau from pages 45–72.</p>

<p>The pacing failure is structural, not tonal. The scenes are well-written. The problem is they are all operating at the same emotional pitch. Pace in drama is not speed — it is variation. A quiet scene after a charged scene reads faster than two quiet scenes in succession.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap" id="sec-11">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-11')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">11</span><span class="section-name">Commercial Viability</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>This is a festival film with a streaming afterlife. It is not a studio acquisition. The budget is low-to-mid range — no significant visual effects, limited locations, character-driven. Its commercial ceiling is A24, MUBI, or a Sundance premiere with streaming sale. That is a viable and honourable market position.</p>

<p>The casting hook needs to be stronger. A script like this sells partly on the strength of the protagonist's role as an actor's piece. Currently, the passivity problem makes it a less compelling pitch. Fix the protagonist and the commercial case strengthens significantly.</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="section-wrap tinted" id="sec-12">

<button class="section-toggle" onclick="toggleSection('sec-12')">

<span class="section-toggle-left"><span class="section-num-badge">12</span><span class="section-name">What's Working</span></span>

<span class="section-chevron">▼</span>

</button>

<div class="section-body">

<p>The visual architecture of the script is genuinely accomplished. The water imagery is consistent, unforced, and structural rather than decorative. The grandmother is one of the most fully realised characters in any script of this type this year.</p>

<p>The dialogue, at its best, is exceptional — the garden scene on page 34 is the kind of writing that gets a script championed. The emotional precision of the opening ten pages earns complete trust. The writer knows what they're doing. The problems are solvable.</p>

</div>

</div>


<!-- THREE THINGS -->

<div class="three-band" id="sec-three">

<div class="three-band-title">Three Things</div>

<div class="three-band-sub">Fix These First · Prioritised · Actionable</div>

<div class="three-grid">

<div>

<div class="thing-n">01</div>

<div class="thing-tag">Most Urgent</div>

<div class="thing-text">Give the protagonist an active choice in Act Two. Pages 45–72. Replace one passive observation scene with a scene where she acts and pays a cost for that action.</div>

</div>

<div>

<div class="thing-n">02</div>

<div class="thing-tag">Structural</div>

<div class="thing-text">Prepare the Act Two break (letter burning, p.88) with one additional scene. The emotional weight needs one more beat before the point of no return lands correctly.</div>

</div>

<div>

<div class="thing-n">03</div>

<div class="thing-tag">Polish</div>

<div class="thing-text">Cut the market scene (p.52) entirely. Its emotional work is done better by the temple scene. Cut the theme-statement monologue (p.82). The script is stronger without both.</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div><!-- /staticDemo -->

</div>
